text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon Bourbon. As I'm sure ya noticed, this park's scary for real, not just for kids.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I have noticed. I collected a testimonial suggesting that this park
inspired last year's party committee, so I have updated the tasklist to
include researching it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, it was unclear who should perform the task, as it was not
listed in the original plans. Hence, as chief of the party committee, I
must attend to it.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Again?! Is that all you can say?! "Task this," "task that"!

text_block_list.name: Park Staff
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, how about a group photo? Squeeze in, smile, and you'll be
best friends again in a flash!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh! Y-yes, please! Everyone, gather round!

text_block_list.name: Park Staff
text_block_list.text: Here we go! Say "cheeeese"!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, this will make such a lovely souvenir. Tamtam, Bourbon, Rice,
Rob Roy, and me...

text_block_list.name: Park Staff
text_block_list.text: Yep, you six look great!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Six?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see. The inclusion of a "ghost" makes commemorative photos scary.
A photo area in a fixed, riggable location... We could use that
technique at our party.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...No more!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Rice?! Riiice!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Th-this ride's brand new this year! Isn't it nice to sit down and chat as
we go along?

LOveMelOVemeLOveMEloVemELovEmeL oVEmELoveMEloVeMeLO
VEmeLoVemE.

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaaah?!
Bwaaaack?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Interesting. By restricting the ability to flee, you can impose a
greater sense of terror.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
All right, how's everyone doing? Anyone need a break? I have drinks,
but no chugging them, okay?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sigh... The next spot, for sure! I'll set up a chance for Rice to talk with Bourbon...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy, is everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, um, I'm fine... Let's go to that haunted house next!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Request: processed.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
"None shall escape this manor. The exit is veiled in shadow, and the
card key is shrouded in mystery."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...We've been locked in.

text_block_list.name: Rob Roy & Rice
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Adding new entry to task list: solve mystery and locate exit.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hold the phone, were ya listening? He said "card key." We can't have
ya fryin' our only way out!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just leave the electromagneto-whatever stuff to me. I'll get us outta
here in no time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I decline. By current assessment, you are not responsible for our
current predicament. In the event of unexpected errors, the
committee chief is first in line to respond.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh, not the "I'll do everything alone" speech again! Look, ya don't
gotta tough it out—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If I may, I'd say that escaping the haunted house is a mission for all
five of us.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I know! How about we split up the tasks? Rice, Bourbon, and I can
search the room on the right.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Tamtam and Rob Roy can investigate the room on the
left. That way, we're bound to escape twice as fast!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Optimal workflow settings, updated.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Looks like this room's got a number lock. I bet the combo's hidden
somewhere in the other room, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Know what? I'm gonna go check up on how Team Bourbon's doing. Ya
comin' with, Rob Roy?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, no... I'll stay.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Rob Roy? From what I've seen, horror's not your forte. Why'd ya
come out to a spooky place like this?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I just... you know, um...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I wanted to give Rice a chance to speak with Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Rice? I gave her a chance myself, and all they talked about was the
weather.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but I'm sure there's something more—she just hasn't worked up
the courage to say it yet.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I saw an article about this park's Halloween event and how letting
loose here can bring people together. I figured it'd be a good place
for Rice to share her inner thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: But here we are, and I still haven't managed to set the mood...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Gotcha. I'll get 'em talkin', so don't you worry.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You stay put here, then. I'll let 'em know you were thinkin' about 'em.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Tamtam. I had a feeling you'd show up. But I'm afraid you're not
getting past me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What?
